description: Browse, search, and export public Luma events from one Go binary — no account, no API key, plus offline full-text search the public API doesn't have.

tools.name: calendars_get
tools.description: Get a calendar (community) by its api_id (cal-...). Required: calendar-id. Returns the CalendarDetail.

params.name: calendar-id
params.description: Calendar api_id (cal-...), from event detail or place calendars

tools.name: discover_categories
tools.description: List event categories (AI, Crypto, Tech, Arts, ...) with upcoming-event counts. Optional: limit (default: 50), cursor. Returns array of Category.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor returned by a previous page (next_cursor)

tools.name: discover_home
tools.description: Featured place, popular places, categories, and calendars on the Luma discover home. Returns the DiscoverHome.

tools.name: events_get
tools.description: Get full details for an event by its api_id (evt-...). Required: event-id. Returns the EventDetail.

tools.name: events_list
tools.description: List upcoming events filtered by city (--city/--place-id) or category (--category). Optional: city, place-id, category (plus 2 more). Returns array of EventEntry.

params.name: city
params.description: City slug, e.g. sf, nyc, miami (filter by place)

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor returned by a previous page (next_cursor)

tools.name: places_calendars
tools.description: List calendars (communities) active in a place. Required: place-id. Returns array of Calendar.

tools.name: places_get
tools.description: Get a place (city) by slug (sf, nyc, miami, ...) or place api_id. Optional: city, place-id. Returns the PlaceDetail.

params.name: city
params.description: City slug, e.g. sf, nyc, miami, london (one of --city or --place-id)

tools.name: places_map
tools.description: Geographic points for events in a place, for mapping. Required: place-id. Returns the MapPoints.
